CONTENT.International career: On 2 October 2009, France-born Si Mohamed was called up to the Algeria A' National Team for a 12-day training camp in Alger in preparation for the 2011 African Championship of Nations qualifiers. On 3 March 2010, he made his debut for the team in a 4–0 friendly win over Liechtenstein.

SUMMARY: Cédric Si Mohamed (born 9 January 1985) is a professional footballer who plays as a goalkeeper for Saint-Cyr Coll..
